message:
fix(wezterm,backpressure,watchdog,event-stream): fix operator precedence, overflow, and close handling

wezterm.rs: Fix operator precedence bug in error classification.
`||` has lower precedence than `&&`, so
`A || B && C` was evaluating as `A || (B && C)` when the intent
was `A || (B && C)`. Added explicit parentheses to make intent
clear and prevent "Connection refused" from being the sole trigger
for NotRunning classification.

backpressure.rs: Replace `as_millis() as u64` with
`u64::try_from(...).unwrap_or(u64::MAX)` in hysteresis timer and
snapshot reporting to prevent silent overflow on Duration→u64 cast.

watchdog.rs: Same overflow fix for ping latency reporting.

event_stream.rs: Fix EventWaiter infinite loop on bus close.
The wait_with_subscriber async block now returns Option<Event>
instead of Event, distinguishing Closed (None → Cancelled) from
Lagged (continue). Also properly match on RecvError::Lagged vs
RecvError::Closed in both AllOf and single-condition paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
